flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at College of Western Idaho fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at College of Western Idaho rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (57.2% → 65.6%).
